title: Service Animals * Blindness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Service Animals * Blindness 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Blindness Deafness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guide dogs and service dogs to enhance the mobility and independence of those who may need them. Individuals must be capable of taking of the dog. 371 E Jericho Turnpike Smithtown, NY 11787 Eligibility: Age 16 and older who are blind Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (631) 930-9000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
